question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.

assessment.note: He pivots from team connection to late direction changes and feeling he missed something, signalling mild drag on engagement and wellbeing; also reveals a likely clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Changing direction late
new_queue.name: When direction changes late, what usually gets missed from your side?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Settle in
new_queue.name: Before we get into anything specific, what would be most useful to talk through today?

new_queue.label: Moving target
new_queue.name: What part of the expectations for your role still feels like a moving target?

new_queue.label: Support access
new_queue.name: When you need help, what usually makes it easy or hard to ask for it here?

new_queue.label: Recent friction
new_queue.name: What has been the most frustrating part of the work lately?

new_queue.label: Confidence check
new_queue.name: Where has your confidence felt strongest or weakest in the last few weeks?

new_queue.label: Requirement churn
new_queue.name: What keeps getting reprioritized in a way that changes your design work?

new_queue.label: Decision pressure
new_queue.name: Where do you feel most pressure to prove yourself in the work?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
